message:
feat(stdlib): add internal C accelerator modules (_ctypes, _curses, _decimal, _elementtree, etc.)

Add 19 internal C accelerator module integrations:
- _ctypes: ctypes primitives (CDLL, c_int, c_void_p, etc.)
- _curses: curses screen handling
- _decimal: decimal arithmetic
- _elementtree: XML element tree
- _md5: MD5 hashing
- _multiprocessing: multiprocessing primitives
- _sha1, _sha2, _sha3: SHA family hashing
- _sre: regex engine
- _ssl: SSL/TLS support
- _sqlite3: SQLite3 database
- _tokenize: Python tokenizer
- _uuid: UUID generation
- _posixsubprocess: subprocess forking
- _zoneinfo: timezone info
- _tracemalloc: memory tracing
- _lzma, _bz2: compression support

All modules integrated into module_functions.zig with FuncMaps and ModuleMap entries.

files.patch:

 const ModuleHandler = *const fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void;
